title: psacalium pringlei
intro: Psacalium pringlei, also known as Pringle's Psacalium, is a plant species in the daisy family native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Psacalium pringlei include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of various skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Psacalium pringlei can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to support skin health and promote wound healing.
